testcase.name: CLI Tool (Phase 10) > encode + decode roundtrip preserves data
CLI Tool (Phase 10) > verify returns 0 for valid file
CLI Tool (Phase 10) > info displays file metadata
CLI Tool (Phase 10) > returns exit code 1 on invalid file
CLI Tool (Phase 10) > returns exit code 2 for usage errors
CLI Tool (Phase 10) > info supports machine-readable JSON output
CLI Tool (Phase 10) > module enable/disable persists daemon module config
CLI Tool (Phase 10) > rpc emits machine-readable JSON for daemon automation

testcase.name: AuditChain (fase 7) > 10K entries â†’ chain integridad verificada al 100%
AuditChain (fase 7) > tamper 1 entry â†’ verify() detecta corruption
AuditChain (fase 7) > tamper payload â†’ verify() detecta corruption
AuditChain (fase 7) > audit write fails â†’ original put() tambien falla (integraciÃ³n)
AuditChain (fase 7) > merkle checkpoint cada 1000 entries con root hash correcto
AuditChain (fase 7) > export() genera JSON lines valido y parseable
AuditChain (fase 7) > serializa appends concurrentes sin romper secuencia ni chain hash
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > 5 failures en 60s → circuit OPEN → calls fail-fast
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > 30s cooldown → HALF-OPEN → 3 probes OK → CLOSED
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > retry con jitter: delays no son idénticos en múltiples retries
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > backpressure: >highWaterMark pending → caller recibe error con queueDepth
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > error metadata siempre presente: {attempts, circuitState, queueDepth}
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > circuitState transitions: CLOSED → OPEN → HALF_OPEN → CLOSED
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > backpressure aplica histéresis hasta bajar de lowWaterMark
ResilienceShell (fase 6) > HALF_OPEN limita probes concurrentes
Daemon 1.3.4 primitives and IPC > putMany supports idempotency and prefix summaries

testcase.name: WAL v2 (fase 4) > lector v2 migra y replays WAL v1 binario
WAL v2 (fase 4) > corrupción CRC en recovery: salta entry corrupta y continúa
testcase.system-err:
[WAL] fsync not supported/allowed on this filesystem. Continuing without durable sync.
[WAL] CRC mismatch at offset 5. Skipping corrupted entry.
[WAL] CRC mismatch at offset 5. Skipping corrupted entry.

testcase.name: WAL v2 (fase 4) > checkpoint corrupto: fallback a checkpoint anterior válido
testcase.system-err:
[WAL] fsync not supported/allowed on this filesystem. Continuing without durable sync.
[WAL] Invalid checkpoint hash detected. Falling back to previous checkpoint.

testcase.name: WAL providers (binary/jsonl) > fsync strict se comporta como fail-closed en errores de sync (binary)
WAL providers (binary/jsonl) > fsync strict se comporta como fail-closed en errores de sync (jsonl)
Inference engine runtime > batches persistence instead of saving once per event
Inference engine runtime > flushes pending runtime state during stop()
Inference engine runtime > changes ranking deterministically after feedback
Inference engine runtime > persists policies, decisions, feedback and runtime health across restart

testcase.name: Inference engine runtime > emits inference runtime and quality telemetry
Inference engine runtime > supports explicit profile/policy seeds and uses them in storage scoring
Official Node SDK > supports putMany and prefix summaries through the typed client

testcase.name: Official Node SDK > verifies standalone GICS files without the daemon
